hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; $repo = 'c:\Users\user\OneDrive\바탕 화면\database_project'; if ($f -and (Test-Path $f)) { git -C $repo add $f 2>$null; $staged = git -C $repo diff --cached --name-only 2>$null; if ($staged) { git -C $repo commit -m "auto: $(Split-Path $f -Leaf)" 2>$null } }
